raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$400.00} for a free vacation promotion through a third-party ( XXXX XXXX  ). The offer was misleading because it did not clearly disclose mandatory daily resort fees that significantly increased the cost. 

I disputed the charge with XXXX XXXX, stating the service was not as described and involved deceptive advertising. My dispute was denied, and I was not given a fair resolution. 

I am requesting that XXXX XXXX properly review this as a services not as described claim and issue a refund.
